summary: ThreeDScene: catenoid soap film between 2 parallel rings. Parametrization (a cosh(v/a) cos u, a cosh(v/a) sin u, v) with u∈[0, 2π], v∈[-h, h]. ValueTracker neck_tr tours a∈{1.0, 0.7, 0.5, 1.2, 0.9} with always_redraw surface + YELLOW boundary rings at z=±h with radius R=a cosh(h/a). Ambient rotation.
